title: Database Schema and Core Infrastructure Setup
description: Design and implement the complete database schema for PhotoBuddy including all tables, relationships, indexes, and Row Level Security (RLS) policies. This includes: users profile extension table, photos table with metadata fields, follows table for social graph, likes table, comments table, photo_tags table, and subscriptions table for freemium tiers. Set up Supabase Storage bucket for photos with appropriate access policies. Out of scope: actual auth implementation, application code that uses these tables.
